ctxMarket: Attention is on Solana’s strong network activity and high usage, but the SOL token price remains below $88. The gap between network growth and token price is drawing scrutiny.
ctxTalking:
• Solana’s network is seeing high usage and volume, but SOL price is not reflecting this growth
• Ongoing research into Solana’s preparedness for quantum computing threats
ctxMatters: High network usage without corresponding price movement raises questions about how value accrues to SOL holders. Quantum readiness is a technical concern that could impact long-term security and trust in the network. Both themes are relevant for users and builders considering Solana’s future resilience and ecosystem health.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Sustained network activity and independent quantum security research are shaping Solana’s narrative.
Noise: Short-term price speculation disconnected from underlying network trends.
ctxGlossary:
Quantum readiness — The preparedness of a blockchain to resist attacks from quantum computers
Firedancer — An independent validator client project for Solana

readMore.title: Solana’s network is booming – So why is SOL still stuck below $88?
